App.title: Booking Admin
App.description: Operational dashboard for the booking system base

Common.searchPagesDescription: Search and navigate to pages in the booking system dashboard.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.analyticsDescription: Analytics widgets can be mounted here when product metrics are connected.
Dashboard.reportsDescription: Use this tab for exportable operational reports.
Dashboard.notificationsDescription: Use this tab for recent system and workflow notifications.

Bookings.title: Bookings
Bookings.description: Reusable table, filter, empty-state, and form patterns for admin operations.
Bookings.queueDescription: Search, filter, and triage booking records before wiring real API data.
Bookings.searchPlaceholder: Search by booking, customer, location, or owner
Bookings.emptyDescription: Try another keyword or reset status filters to see all booking records.
Bookings.quickCreateDescription: A compact form pattern for later booking, user, and system workflows.
Bookings.visibleLabelsDescription: Use visible labels instead of placeholder-only fields.
Bookings.ownerDescription: Operators can update this after assignment.

RouteStates.notFoundDescription: The admin route does not exist or has not been added to the dashboard navigation yet.
RouteStates.errorDescription: The admin view could not be rendered. Retry the route or inspect the browser console and server logs.
